calendar.matters:
Petition To Establish The Equitable Adoption Of Princess Green By Grady Lovett
Off Calendar Sep-17-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Meredith appeared by telephone for Princess Green.

The Court stated that it seems Mr. Meredith might want to amend the petition to request a determination of the parent-child relationship under Probate Code 6454. Mr. Meredith stated that he does not believe it is appropriate to apply it to the circumstances of this case, that Mr. Lovett raised the child (Ms. Green) since a few days old, that the biological Mother was incarcerated shortly after Ms. Green's birth, that Mr. Lovett referred to Ms. Green as his adopted child and everyone knew her as his adopted child, and that Mr. Lovett would have adopted Ms. Green if there wouldn't have been a legal barrier to an adoption. The Petition to Establish the Equitable Adoption of Princess Green by Grady Lovett is under submission. Mr. Meredith is to provide a proposed order.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Establish The Equitable Adoption Of Princess Green By Grady Lovett
Off Calendar Aug-17-2020 Continued To Sep-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition to Establish the Equitable Adoption of Princess Green by Grady Lovett is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

August 18, 2020:
Based on the representation of Counsel that he attempted to appear remotely and was unable to get through, the matter is put back on calendar and is continued to September 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Of Proof Of Sherlyn Brown'S Payment For The Surcharge
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Ward for (petitioner) Princess Green.

Mr. Ward reported that Ms. Brown has not filed anything, he has been unable to obtain records from Medi-Care and that his client is willing to deduct the $17,618.70 claim and reduce the amount of the surcharge to $24,999.30. The status of filing proof of Sherlyn Brown's payment for surcharge is taken off calendar and Mr. Ward is to submit a proposed order reflecting the new surcharge.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Mr. Ward stated that he gave Ms. Brown as much direction as he could. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Stewart. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Ordered Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-09-2013 Continued To Feb-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Ward for Princess Green. Sherlyn Brown in Propria Persona.

Ms. Brown stated that she does not know what the proper filing is, that she has no funds to pay an Attorney and that she did an accounting the best she could. Mr. Ward stated
that there is no beginning or ending balance, that there are no receipts, that there is no proof of the expenses, that there were $9,500.00 in expenses for a wheel chair ramp and that the ramp was never built. Ms. Brown responded stating that she has some medical receipts and that the rest of the receipts are in a drawer in Mr. Grady's office (room in the home). The Court stated that the accounting needs to filed pursuant to Probate Code 1060, ordered the Parties to meet and confer and that both Parties exchange documents. The status hearings were continued to February 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Ordered Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Continued To Dec-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Ward for Princess Green.

Mr. Ward stated that he just received Ms. Browns filing, that it is completely inadequate, that there is no beginning and ending balance, and that there are a number of issues with the accounting. Status on filing of ordered accounting and the order to appear were continued to December 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Ward will prepare a further order to appear to Ms. Brown explaining that the accounting needs to be filed in proper format pursuant to Probate Code 1060 and filed at least three court days prior the hearing.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Ordered Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-09-2013 Continued To Nov-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Meredith for Princess Green.

Mr. Meredith stated that he has heard nothing from Sherlyn Brown and that she has not responded to anything. An Order to Appear will be issued to Sherlyn Brown to appear on November 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the accounting for her time as Durable Power of Attorney as ordered by the Court on September 17, 2013 has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date. With regard to the 1996 Trust, Mr. Meredith stated that they received a copy of a Certificate of Trust from US Bank, that Bryant Lovett was named Successor Trustee, that Mr. Lovett indicated that he does not want to serve and that they need access to said trust. The Court informed Counsel that Attorney Angela Mitchell withdrew their request with regard to the Trust on September 9, 2013 and that he will need to file a new petition.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition Pursuant To Probate Code 17200: To Establish The Grady Lovett 2011 Revocable Trust, To Compel An Accounting Of The Trust, To Determine To Who
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Angela Mitchell for Princess Green (Petitioner).

Ms. Mitchell stated that request with regard to the 1996 Trust is withdrawn, that she has received document showing that Brian Lovett is named as the successor trustee and that she will contact him to see how he wants to act. The Court declared that the 2011 Trust is a valid trust and ordered that Sherlyn Brown to account for the period from November 15, 2011 to present time (subject to review of order). Status on filing the ordered accounting is set on October 09, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition Pursuant To Probate Code 17200: To Establish The Grady Lovett 2011 Revocable Trust, To Compel An Accounting Of The Trust, To Determine To Who
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Continued To Sep-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Meredith for Princess Green. Sherlyn Brown in Propria Persona.

The Petition to Establish The Grady Lovett 2011 Revocable Trust, to Compel an Accounting, etc. was continued to September 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Brown to obtain Counsel and for Mr. Meredith to do personal service.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition Pursuant To Probate Code 17200: To Establish The Grady Lovett 2011 Revocable Trust, To Compel An Accounting Of The Trust, To Determine To Who
Off Calendar Jun-18-2013 Continued To Jul-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Pursuant To Probate Code 17200: To Establish The Grady Lovett 2011 Revocable Trust, To Compel An Accounting Of The Trust, To Determine To Who
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Continued To Jun-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
